flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Lanier Technical College fell 13% between 2006 and 2009 (37.8% → 33.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Lanier Technical College rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 (3.8k → 4.6k).
